locations.name: Foosha Village
locations.description: The tiny harbor village on Dawn Island where Luffy's story begins. Here, a young boy ate a cursed Devil Fruit and watched a red-haired pirate sacrifice his arm to save him — vowing one day to surpass even the great Shanks.
keyEvents: Luffy eats the Gomu Gomu no Mi (Gum-Gum Fruit)
Shanks loses his arm saving Luffy from the Lord of the Coast
Luffy swears to become King of the Pirates

locations.name: Shells Town
locations.description: A fortified Marine town ruled by the cruel Captain Morgan. Roronoa Zoro, the pirate hunter, is held prisoner here — until a straw-hatted boy shows up and tears the Marine base apart to free him.
keyEvents: Luffy rescues Roronoa Zoro from execution
Zoro joins the crew as the first Straw Hat
Defeat of Captain 'Axe-Hand' Morgan

locations.name: Orange Town
locations.description: A town terrorized by Buggy the Clown and his pirate crew. The Chop-Chop Devil Fruit user and former Roger Pirate proves a surprisingly dangerous foe — until Luffy sends him flying, and a certain thief joins the party.
keyEvents: First encounter with Buggy the Clown
Nami joins the crew (temporarily) as navigator
Luffy defeats Buggy with Buggy's own hands

locations.name: Syrup Village
locations.description: A quiet coastal village hiding a dark conspiracy. Usopp, the village's resident liar and storyteller, discovers that the local nobleman Klahadore is actually the deadly pirate Captain Kuro.
keyEvents: Usopp joins the crew as sniper
Defeat of Captain Kuro and the Black Cat Pirates
The crew acquires the Going Merry

locations.name: Baratie
locations.description: A grand floating restaurant navigated across the seas by chefs with iron fists. Here Luffy meets the chivalrous cook Sanji — and witnesses Zoro's devastating defeat at the hands of Hawk-Eyes Mihawk, igniting a lifelong vow.
keyEvents: Sanji joins the crew as cook
Mihawk defeats Zoro — Zoro swears to never lose again
Don Krieg's siege of the Baratie is repelled

locations.name: Arlong Park
locations.description: The stronghold of Arlong the Saw, a Fishman pirate who has enslaved Nami's village for a decade. In one of One Piece's most emotionally powerful moments, Luffy destroys the tower that imprisoned Nami — and the tears finally fall.
keyEvents: Nami's tragic past revealed — 8 years enslaved by Arlong
Luffy destroys Arlong Park — 'Nami is MY nakama!'
Nami officially joins the crew

locations.name: Loguetown
locations.description: The Town of the Beginning and the End — birthplace and execution site of the Pirate King Gol D. Roger. Luffy stands on the very scaffold where Roger was executed, laughing as lightning strikes down Buggy's blade in a bolt of fate.
keyEvents: Luffy reaches the scaffold where Roger was executed
Lightning saves Luffy from Buggy at the last second
Captain Smoker first encounters Luffy
The crew departs for the Grand Line

locations.name: Reverse Mountain
locations.description: The only conventional gateway to the Grand Line — a mountain where seawater flows upward and ships are launched through the peak into the chaos beyond. Here the crew meets the enormous whale Laboon, who waits for friends that may never return.
keyEvents: The Straw Hats enter the Grand Line
Encounter with the whale Laboon — Brook's first hint
Miss Wednesday and Mr. 9 (Baroque Works agents) appear

locations.name: Whiskey Peak
locations.description: A seemingly welcoming island where the locals celebrate arriving pirates with endless food and drink — because they're actually Baroque Works bounty hunters waiting for them to pass out. The hospitality is a trap.
keyEvents: Baroque Works trap revealed
Zoro defeats 100 bounty hunters solo
Vivi (Princess of Alabasta) reveals herself

locations.name: Little Garden
locations.description: A prehistoric island trapped in the Jurassic era — dinosaurs roam freely and two giants, Dorry and Broggy, have been fighting their eternal duel for over 100 years. Baroque Works agents attempt to end their battle with treachery.
keyEvents: Giants Dorry and Broggy's 100-year duel
Baroque Works agents Mr. 3 and Miss Goldenweek defeated
Nami contracts a mysterious illness

locations.name: Drum Island
locations.description: A perpetually snow-covered island with a sole doctor — Dr. Kureha, who trained the reindeer Tony Tony Chopper. In an iconic scene, Luffy and Sanji scale the Drum Rockies in a blizzard, carrying their sick crewmates on their backs.
keyEvents: Tony Tony Chopper joins the crew as doctor
Luffy carries Nami and Sanji up the Drum Rockies
Wapol the Bragman defeated

locations.name: Alabasta
locations.description: A vast desert kingdom on the brink of civil war, secretly engineered by Warlord Crocodile of Baroque Works. In the rain-soaked finale, Luffy defeats Crocodile with blood and salt — his first victory over a Warlord of the Sea.
keyEvents: Crocodile defeated — Luffy's first Warlord victory
Vivi's tearful farewell — 'We are forever your nakama!'
Nico Robin (Miss All Sunday) joins the crew

locations.name: Jaya
locations.description: A pirate-infested port island ruled by the terrifying Bellamy. In a ruined bar, Luffy meets a man named Teach — not yet known as Blackbeard — and refuses to fight a fool who mocks his dream. The crew also finds the sky island map.
keyEvents: First encounter with Marshall D. Teach (Blackbeard)
Bellamy the Hyena mocks dreams — Luffy refuses to fight back
Sky island map discovered — the voyage to Skypiea begins

locations.name: Skypiea
locations.description: A miraculous island in the clouds, 10,000 meters above the sea. Luffy and crew are hunted as criminals in this divine land ruled by the self-proclaimed god Enel. Here lie the Poneglyphs, the golden city of Shandora, and ancient secrets of the world.
keyEvents: Luffy defeats the 'god' Enel with Gum-Gum immunity to lightning
First Poneglyph discovered — key to the ancient history
The golden bell of Shandora rings after 400 years of silence

locations.name: Long Ring Long Land
locations.description: A strange ring-shaped archipelago where every animal is stretched and elongated by the unusual terrain. The Straw Hats must compete in the Davy Back Fight against the Foxy Pirates — a series of pirate games with nakama as the ultimate prize.
keyEvents: Davy Back Fight against Foxy the Silver Fox
Chopper and Robin temporarily stolen and won back
Admiral Aokiji (Kuzan) first appears and defeats the crew

locations.name: Water 7
locations.description: The City of Water — a Venice-like metropolis of canals and the finest shipwrights in the world. The Going Merry is condemned to death, Robin vanishes, and the crew is shattered from within before they discover the truth beneath the sorrow.
keyEvents: Going Merry declared unseaworthy — the crew is torn apart
Robin's disappearance — she says 'I want to die'
CP9 revealed — Lucci, Kaku, and the cipher pol agents

locations.name: Enies Lobby
locations.description: The 'Island of Justice' — a World Government fortress where criminals are brought to await erasure from history. The Straw Hats declare war on the World Government itself, and Robin's heartbreaking cry shakes the heavens: 'I WANT TO LIVE!'
keyEvents: Robin rescued — 'I want to live!' brings the crew to tears
Luffy defeats Rob Lucci — hardest fight of East Blue / Paradise era
The Straw Hats burn the World Government flag — wanted posters soar
Going Merry's emotional final voyage and funeral

locations.name: Thriller Bark
locations.description: A massive ghost ship the size of an island, sailing through the Florian Triangle in eternal fog. Warlord Gecko Moria rules this haunted realm, stealing shadows from the living. And here, a skeleton musician finally has a chance to live again.
keyEvents: Brook joins the crew as musician — skeleton swordsman
Zoro's legendary sacrifice: absorbs all of Luffy's pain from Kuma
Warlord Gecko Moria defeated

locations.name: Sabaody Archipelago
locations.description: A mangrove forest of bubble-producing trees at the base of the Red Line — the last stop before the New World. Here the Straw Hats are utterly crushed, scattered by Bartholomew Kuma to different corners of the world in their most devastating defeat.
keyEvents: Luffy punches a World Noble (Celestial Dragon) — the Marines mobilize
Admiral Kizaru defeats the crew with ease
Kuma scatters the entire Straw Hat crew to the ends of the earth
The crew separated for 2 years

locations.name: Amazon Lily
locations.description: A hidden island in the Calm Belt, home to the fearsome Kuja tribe — a nation of warrior women. Luffy crash-lands here after being scattered, where Boa Hancock and her sisters see his scars and his iron will for the first time.
keyEvents: Luffy meets Warlord Boa Hancock — she falls in love
Luffy learns Ace is to be publicly executed at Marineford
Hancock smuggles Luffy to Impel Down

locations.name: Impel Down
locations.description: The world's most impenetrable prison, built underwater in the Calm Belt. Six levels of escalating hell, guarded by the fearsome Warden Magellan. Luffy tears through all of it — poisoned, broken, and barely alive — to rescue his brother Ace.
keyEvents: Luffy infiltrates all 6 levels solo — nearly dies from Magellan's poison
Ivankov cures Luffy with hormones at the cost of 10 years of life
Luffy fails — Ace has already been transferred to Marineford
Luffy leads a mass prison break instead

locations.name: Marineford
locations.description: The Marine Headquarters — the seat of world power. The Summit War of Marineford is the most catastrophic event in One Piece history. In the end, not all nakama can be saved — and Luffy shatters, screaming in the ruins.
keyEvents: Whitebeard declares war on the World Government
Ace is freed — and immediately killed shielding Luffy from Akainu
Whitebeard dies standing — 'One Piece is real!'
Luffy collapses; the world of pirates is forever changed

locations.name: Rusukaina
locations.description: A treacherous island in the Calm Belt where 500 species of animals stronger than Luffy roam freely. Here, under the tutelage of Dark King Silvers Rayleigh, Luffy spends two and a half years mastering Haki — preparing for the New World.
keyEvents: Luffy trains with Rayleigh — masters all three forms of Haki
Luffy sends a coded message: meet at Sabaody in 2 years
Boa Hancock protects the island and keeps his secret

locations.name: Fishman Island
locations.description: An underwater kingdom 10,000 meters below the surface, nestled at the base of the Red Line. Home to Fishmen and Merfolk, torn apart by racial hatred. The Straw Hats reunite here for the first time in two years — and defeat the New Fishman Pirates.
keyEvents: The Straw Hat crew reunites after 2 years apart
Hody Jones and the New Fishman Pirates defeated
Luffy's New World bounty soars — 400 million berries
Neptune pledges the Road Poneglyph to Luffy

locations.name: Punk Hazard
locations.description: The first New World island — a hellscape split in two: half frozen in eternal ice, half scorched by volcanic flame, the result of a battle between Akainu and Aokiji four years prior. Caesar Clown's monstrous experiments run here in the shadows.
keyEvents: The Straw Hats' first New World island
Alliance formed with Trafalgar Law
Caesar Clown — mad scientist — captured and subdued
Momonosuke of Wano first appears

locations.name: Dressrosa
locations.description: A vivid kingdom of passion and color — flamenco, corrida, toys that were once humans. Warlord Donquixote Doflamingo's tyranny runs ten years deep. Luffy awakens Gear Fourth for the first time and defeats the most powerful Warlord in the seas.
keyEvents: Luffy activates Gear Fourth — Boundman — for the first time
Doflamingo defeated — the Birdcage falls
The Mera Mera no Mi (Ace's fruit) appears and is destroyed
The Grand Fleet forms — 5,000 warriors swear loyalty to Luffy

locations.name: Zou
locations.description: An island that is also a living creature — Zunesha, a colossal elephant wandering the seas for centuries. Home to the Mink Tribe, Zou holds a Road Poneglyph and the truth of the Kozuki clan. The path to Wano begins here.
keyEvents: Zou revealed as an island on the back of the elephant Zunesha
Road Poneglyph discovered — one of four keys to Laugh Tale
Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance formed
Sanji taken by Big Mom's family — crew separates again

locations.name: Whole Cake Island
locations.description: The central island of Big Mom's 35-island archipelago — a surreal land of food and confectionery where everything is alive. Luffy's team infiltrates to rescue Sanji from a political marriage, navigating one of the most perilous Yonko territories.
keyEvents: Luffy infiltrates Big Mom's domain to rescue Sanji
Sanji's true origin revealed — Vinsmoke family and Germa 66
Big Mom's Poneglyph rubbings obtained
Escape through mirror world — Big Mom in pursuit

locations.name: Wano Country
locations.description: An isolated, closed country with the soul of ancient Japan — samurai, shogunate, and haiku under Kaido's iron rule. The Alliance's greatest battle culminates on the Skull Dome of Onigashima. Here, the drums of liberation echo across creation.
keyEvents: Kaido defeated — Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and the power of Nika
Yamato, Momonosuke, and the samurai liberate Wano
Big Mom and Kaido — two Yonko fall in one night
Luffy's true Devil Fruit revealed: Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika

locations.name: Egghead Island
locations.description: The Island of the Future — Dr. Vegapunk's research facility, 500 years ahead of the rest of the world. The secrets of the Void Century begin to surface here, and the World Government's most desperate manhunt is unleashed. The Final Saga begins.
keyEvents: Dr. Vegapunk and his satellites encountered
Void Century revelations: the truth of the Poneglyphs and the Ancient Kingdom
Five Elders descend on the island — global broadcast initiated
Luffy's bounty reaches 3 billion berries
